Interface IObjectClass

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return information about an object class.

[Guid("1AFCDB31-AC09-11D2-8A1E-006097AFF44E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IObjectClass : IClass

Properties

AliasName

The alias name of the object class.

string AliasName { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

CLSID 

UID CLSID { get; }

Property Value

UID

EXTCLSID 

UID EXTCLSID { get; }

Property Value

UID

Extension 

object Extension { get; }

Property Value

object

IPropertySet ExtensionProperties { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

IFields Fields { get; }

Property Value

IFields

HasOID 

bool HasOID { get; }

Property Value

bool

Indexes 

IIndexes Indexes { get; }

Property Value

IIndexes

OIDFieldName 

string OIDFieldName { get; }

Property Value

string

ObjectClassID

The unique ID for the object class.

int ObjectClassID { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelationshipClasses[esriRelRole]

The relationship classes in which this object class participates in for the specified role.

IEnumRelationshipClass RelationshipClasses[esriRelRole Role] { get; }

Parameters

Role esriRelRole

Property Value

IEnumRelationshipClass
